author: lOrm
content: Fixed (option 3 from the QA report). git_in's wait loop now uses exponential backoff via GIT_WAIT_BACKOFF_MS = [1, 2, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100] ms — schedule pins on 100ms once exhausted, preserving the prior upper bound (and therefore the 30s timeout resolution). Trivial git plumbing commands (rev-parse, check-ref-format) that exit in <1ms now see <8ms wall-clock overhead instead of the flat ~100ms. The async-tokio refactor (option 2) is the cleaner architectural move but a much wider change — deferred. Backoff captures the user-visible regression here.
